question: Which revenue stream contributes the most to total in the last period?

options.A: The purple area (Subscriptions) shows the largest share.
options.B: The red area (Subscriptions) represents the dominant share.
options.C: The green area (Licensing) indicates the highest share.
options.D: Cannot determine which revenue stream contributes the most without a legend to explain what each color represents.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
